# Information Integrity Audit Checklist

- [ ] AI-generated content disclosure policy exists.
- [ ] Provenance is preserved where appropriate.
- [ ] High-impact synthetic media receives review.
- [ ] Original sources are credited and linked.
- [ ] Source diversity is monitored.
- [ ] Low-integrity amplification is monitored.
- [ ] Fact-checking workflow is documented.
- [ ] Corrections are visible and tracked.
- [ ] Platform governance actions are appealable where appropriate.
- [ ] Researcher access and transparency reporting are reviewed.
- [ ] Human rights and freedom of expression impacts are assessed.
- [ ] Public-interest journalism impacts are considered.
